features: Package Included：This set includes 30 pcs assorted Christmas style bags. 4 pcs extra-large gift bags (44*60 cm), 6 pcs large gift bags (39*51 cm), 8 pcs medium gift bags (29*43 cm) and 12 pcs small gift bags (24*32 cm).

Easy to Use：The drawstring closure Christmas bag is easy to close and open, perfect for quickly wrapping presents and avoiding losing the items inside. The beautiful ribbon on the top of Christmas goody bags will make your gift wrap look great and is long enough that it won't slip off easily.

Sturdy：The xmas gift bags are made of premium foil material, which is lightweight, sturdy, reusable, and not easy to break. With the opaque foil cover, it is impossible to see through the contents of the gift bag. Don't worry about giving away your surprise in advance.

Attractive design：This is a set of Christmas drawstring gift bags in 12 designs, combining various Christmas elements such as Santa Claus, snowmen, reindeer, Christmas trees, and so on. Decorate your gifts with these gift bags to make your Christmas full of surprises and happiness.

Wide Application：These Christmas bags can store Christmas presents such as toys, dolls, hats, candies, and cookies. It can also be used as a decoration for a Thanksgiving party, Christmas party, birthday party, New Year, etc., to enhance the festival atmosphere.
description: Product Description Product Features Drawstring Design Easy to use, just pull the ribbon on both sides and tie the bow. This design is perfect for quickly wrapping gifts and preventing loss of items inside. Sturdy Material Made of premium foil material that will not break easily. Can be reused to save you money. Lovely Appearance The beautiful ribbon on the top of Christmas goody bags will make your gift wrap look perfect. The ribbon is long enough that it won't slip off easily. Classic Christmas Elements There are 12 different designs in total. More surprises for friends and family.
